zh.Lamesley, Durham, , England: 英國英格蘭達勒姆拉梅斯利
zh.lifeSummary: 當Isabel de Brus於1245年出生在蘇格蘭度福利爾安南達爾 迪斯特利可特時，她的父親Sir Robert De Bruce V21歲，母親Isabel de Clare19歲。她於1263年與John Fitz Marmaduke在英國英格蘭達勒姆霍登結婚。他們至少是1個兒子和1個女兒的父母。她去世於1285年在英國英格蘭達勒姆拉梅斯利享年40歲，埋葬在英國達勒姆易亞辛頓。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Isabel de Brus于1245年出生在苏格兰度福利爾安南達爾 迪斯特利可特时，她的父亲Sir Robert De Bruce V21岁，母亲Isabel de Clare19岁。她于1263年与John Fitz Marmaduke在英国英格兰達勒姆霍登结婚。他们至少是1个儿子和1个女儿的父母。她去世于1285年在英国英格兰達勒姆拉梅斯利享年40岁，埋葬在英国達勒姆易亞辛頓。

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Brus
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Polish, Slovenian, Czech, Sorbian, and Jewish (eastern Ashkenazic): from Slavic brus ‘whetstone’, presumably a metonymic occupational name for someone who honed or sharpened blades; possibly also a nickname for a clumsy or coarse fellow. Compare Bruss .
Slovenian: from an old dialect short form of the personal name Ambrož (see Ambrose ). Compare Bruss .
French: topographic name for someone living on a heath, from Occitan brusc ‘heather’, or a habitational name from (Le/Les) Brus, the name of several places in southern France.

variants.name: Bruss
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  German Otto, Eldor, Reinhard, Rudie, Wilhelm.
German (also Brüss): from a short form of the medieval personal name Ambrosius (see Ambrose ).
Americanized or Germanized form of Polish, Slovenian, Czech, Sorbian, and Jewish (eastern Ashkenazic)   Brus  , meaning ‘whetstone’ and, as a Slovenian name, also ‘Ambrose’.

nameMeanings.name: Isabel
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Originally a Spanish version of   Elizabeth  , which was coined by deletion of the first syllable and alteration of the final consonant sound to one that can normally end a word in Spanish. The name was imported into France in the early Middle Ages, and thence into England. It was a royal name, and its enduring popularity may have been enhanced by the fact that it was borne by a queen of England—  Isabella  (  1296–1358 ), daughter of  Philip IV  of France—even though she led a turbulent life and eventually had her husband,  Edward II , murdered.

variants.name: Isabell
meanings: Originally a Spanish version of   Elizabeth  , which was coined by deletion of the first syllable and alteration of the final consonant sound to one that can normally end a word in Spanish. The name was imported into France in the early Middle Ages, and thence into England. It was a royal name, and its enduring popularity may have been enhanced by the fact that it was borne by a queen of England—  Isabella  (  1296–1358 ), daughter of  Philip IV  of France—even though she led a turbulent life and eventually had her husband,  Edward II , murdered.

variants.name: Isabelle
meanings: form of   Isabel  , now in frequent use in the English-speaking world.

variants.name: Isobella
meanings: form of   Isabel  , which has been popular in England since the 18th century and has recently become the preferred form of the name.

variants.name: Isobelle
meanings: Originally a Spanish version of   Elizabeth  , which was coined by deletion of the first syllable and alteration of the final consonant sound to one that can normally end a word in Spanish. The name was imported into France in the early Middle Ages, and thence into England. It was a royal name, and its enduring popularity may have been enhanced by the fact that it was borne by a queen of England—  Isabella  (  1296–1358 ), daughter of  Philip IV  of France—even though she led a turbulent life and eventually had her husband,  Edward II , murdered.

historicEvents.title: 100 Years of Conflict Between England and France Ends
historicEvents.description: Treaty of Paris was signed on December 4, 1259, which ended 100 years of conflict between England and France.

en.lifeSummary: When Isabel de Brus was born in 1245, in Annandale District, Dumfriesshire, Scotland, her father, Sir Robert De Bruce V, was 21 and her mother, Isabel de Clare, was 19. She married John Fitz Marmaduke in 1263, in Horden, Durham, England, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 1 son and 1 daughter. She died in 1285, in Lamesley, Durham, England, United Kingdom, at the age of 40, and was buried in Easington, Durham, England.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Isabel de Brus est née en 1245, à Annandale District, Dumfriesshire, Écosse, son père, Sir Robert De Bruce V, avait 21 ans et sa mère, Isabel de Clare, avait 19 ans. Elle a épousé John Fitz Marmaduke en 1263, à Horden, Durham, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni. Ils ont eu au moins 1 fils et 1 fille. Elle est décédée en 1285, à Lamesley, Durham, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, à l’âge de 40 ans, et a été enterrée à Easington, Durham, Angleterre.

de.lifeSummary: Als Isabel de Brus 1245 in Annandale District, Dumfriesshire, Scotland geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Sir Robert De Bruce V 21 und ihre Mutter Isabel de Clare 19. Sie hat 1263 in Horden, Durham, England, United Kingdom John Fitz Marmaduke geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 1 Sohn und 1 Tochter. Sie starb 1285 im Alter von 40 Jahren in Lamesley, Durham, England, United Kingdom und wurde in Easington, Durham, England begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Isabel de Brus è nata il nel 1245 nel Annandale District, Dumfriesshire, Scotland, sua padre, Sir Robert De Bruce V, aveva 21 anni e sua madre, Isabel de Clare, aveva 19 anni. Lei sposato John Fitz Marmaduke nel 1263, nel Horden, Durham, Inghilterra, Regno Unito. Erano genitori di almeno 1 figlio e 1 figlia. Morì nel 1285, nel Lamesley, Durham, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, all'età di 40 anni, e fu sepolta a Easington, Durham, England.

ja.lifeSummary: Isabel de Brusが1245年にスコットランドダムフリーシュアイアアナンダル ディストリクトで生まれた時，父Sir Robert De Bruce Vは21歳，母Isabel de Clareは19歳であった。1263年にイギリスイギリスダルハムホールデンでJohn Fitz Marmadukeと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも1人の息子と1人の娘の親であった。彼女は1285年にイギリスイギリスダルハムラムスリーで40歳で死去し，イギリスダルハムエアシントンにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Isabel de Brus(이)가 1245년 스컷랜드 드프리실르 애난데일 디스트릭트에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Sir Robert De Bruce V(은)는 21세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Isabel de Clare(은)는 19세였다. 그녀는 1263년 영국 잉글랜드 뒤람 호르든에서 John Fitz Marmaduke(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 한 명의 아들과 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1285년 영국 잉글랜드 뒤람 램슬리에서 40세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 뒤람 이징턴에 묻혔다.

mn.Horden, Durham, England: Horden, Durham, Англи, Нэгдсэн Вант Улс
mn.Lamesley, Durham, , England: Lamesley, Durham, Англи, Нэгдсэн Вант Улс

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Isabel de Brus nasceu em 1245, em Annandale District, Dumfriesshire, Scotland, seu pai, Sir Robert De Bruce V, tinha 21 anos e sua mãe, Isabel de Clare, tinha 19 anos. Ela casou-se com John Fitz Marmaduke em 1263, em Horden, Durham, Inglaterra, United Kingdom. Eles tiveram pelo menos 1 filho e 1 filha. Ela faleceu em 1285, em Lamesley, Durham, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, com 40 anos, e foi sepultada em Easington, Durham, Inglaterra.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Isabel de Brus родилась в 1245 г. в местности аннандеил дистрикт, думфриессхир, Шотландия, её отцу по имени Sir Robert De Bruce V было 21 год, а матери, которую звали Isabel de Clare, 19. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени John Fitz Marmaduke в 1263 г. в местности хаурден, дурам, Англия, Великобритания. У них был по крайней мере 1 сын и 1 дочь. Она умерла в 1285 г. в местности лэмесли, дурам, Англия, Великобритания в возрасте 40 лет и была похоронена в местности эасингтон, дурам, Англия.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Isabel de Brus nació en 1245, en Annandale District, Dumfriesshire, Scotland, su papá, Sir Robert De Bruce V, tenía 21 años y su mamá, Isabel de Clare, tenía 19 años. Se casó con John Fitz Marmaduke en 1263, en Horden, Durham, Inglaterra, Reino Unido. Fueron padres de por lo menos 1 hijo y 1 hija. Murió en 1285, en Lamesley, Durham, Inglaterra, Reino Unido, a la edad de 40 años, y fue sepultada en Easington, Durham, Inglaterra.
